text.cropfarminghelper.config.title: Crop Farming Helper Config
text.cropfarminghelper.config.option.chu: The horizontal radius (in chunks) around the player to scan for crops.
text.cropfarminghelper.config.option.sca: The vertical radius (in 16 block high chunks) around the player to scan for crops.
text.cropfarminghelper.config.option.hid: If enabled, 'perfect' conditions overlays will be hidden.
text.cropfarminghelper.config.option.per: The overlay color used for optimal crop conditions. (33.3% random tick growth chance)
text.cropfarminghelper.config.option.goo: The overlay color used for acceptable crop conditions. (25% random tick growth chance)
text.cropfarminghelper.config.option.bad: The overlay color used for bad crop conditions.
text.cropfarminghelper.config.option.max: The maximum amount of chunks being computed in a single tick. Lower this if experiencing lags.
text.cropfarminghelper.config.button.rep: Report an Issue or request a Feature
Opens the GitHub Issues page of this mod
